items.name: Amulet Coin
items.description: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It doubles the battle money if the holding POKéMON takes part.

items.name: Antidote
items.description: A spray-type medicine. It heals one Pokémon from a poisoning.

items.name: Apicot Berry ↑↑
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it raises the Sp. Def stat in a pinch.

items.name: Assault Vest
items.description: If held, raises Sp. Def by 50% but prevents the use of status moves.

items.name: Big Pearl
items.description: A quite-large pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold at a high price.

items.name: Black Augurite
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Black Belt
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A belt that boosts determination and Fighting-type moves.

items.name: Black Flower
items.description: A black flower that grows in the Yggdrasil Labyrinth.

items.name: Blackglasses
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A shady-looking pair of glasses that boosts Dark-type moves.

items.name: Blue Bell (Key Item)
items.description: A mysterious Blue Bell found in the Fourth Stratum. It emanates a strange aura.

items.name: Blue Flower
items.description: A blue flower that grows in the Yggdrasil Labyrinth.

items.name: Blue Shard
items.description: A small blue shard. It appears to be from some sort of a tool made long ago.

items.name: Brightpowder
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It casts a tricky glare that lowers the opponent’s accuracy.

items.name: Calcium
items.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Sp. Atk stat of one Pokémon by 20.

items.name: Carbos
items.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Speed stat of one Pokémon by 20.

items.name: Charcoal
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A combustible fuel that boosts the power of Fire-type moves.

items.name: Cheri Berry
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it will be used in battle to heal paralysis.

items.name: Chesto Berry
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it will be used in battle to wake up.

items.name: Choice Band
items.description: Headband that boosts Atk by 50%, but allows the use of only one move.

items.name: Choice Scarf
items.description: A scarf that boosts Speed by 50%, but allows the use of only one move.

items.name: Choice Specs
items.description: Glasses that boost Sp. Atk by 50%, but allows the use of only one move.

items.name: Dawn Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Dolomite
items.description: A mineral that can be extracted from the Yggdrasil mines.

items.name: Dragon Fang
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A hard and sharp fang that boosts the power of Dragon-type moves.

items.name: Dubious Disc
items.description: An enigmatic disc with dubious data. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.

items.name: Dusk Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Electirizer
items.description: A box full of electric energy. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.

items.name: Elixir
items.description: Restores the PP of all moves for one Pokémon by 10 points each.

items.name: Emerald
items.description: A mineral that can be extracted from the Yggdrasil mines.

items.name: Ether
items.description: Restores a selected move’s PP by 10 points for one Pokémon.

items.name: EV-Editor
items.description: A device used to edit and reassign the EVs of your Pokémon.

items.name: Everstone
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holding Pokémon is prevented from evolving.

items.name: Eviolite
items.description: If held, boosts both defences of a not-fully evolved Pokémon by 50%.

items.name: Expert Belt
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a well-worn belt that boosts the power of super effective moves.

items.name: Fire Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Flame Orb
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Burns the holder at the end of the turn.

items.name: Ganlon Berry
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it raises the Defense stat in a pinch.

items.name: Good Rod
items.description: A new, good-quality fishing rod. Use it by any body of water to fish for wild Pokémon.

items.name: Great Ball
items.description: A good, quality Ball that offers a higher Pokémon catch rate than a standard Poké Ball.

items.name: Green Shard
items.description: A small green shard. It appears to be from some sort of a tool made long ago.

items.name: Hard Stone
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. An unbreakable stone that boosts the power of Rock-type moves.

items.name: HP Up
items.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base HP of one Pokémon by 20.

items.name: Iron
items.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Defense stat of one Pokémon by 20.

items.name: Itemfinder (Key Item)
items.description: A device used for finding hidden items.

items.name: Lansat Berry
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it raises the critical-hit ratio in a pinch.

items.name: Leaf Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Leftovers
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holding Pokémon gradually regains HP during battle.

items.name: Leppa Berry ↑↑
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it will be used in battle to restore 10 PP.

items.name: Life Orb
items.description: If held, boosts the power of moves but at the cost of some HP.

items.name: Light Clay
items.description: If held, extends the duration of barrier moves like Reflect or Light Screen.

items.name: Link Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Lucky Egg
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. An egg filled with happiness that earns extra Exp. points in battle.

items.name: Lum Berry
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it will be used in battle to heal any problem.

items.name: Magmarizer
items.description: A box brimming with magma energy. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.

items.name: Magna Vis (Key Item)
items.description: An ancient bracelet that temporarily increases the strength of the wearer.

items.name: Magnet
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A powerful magnet that boosts the power of Electric-type moves.

items.name: Max Elixir
items.description: Fully restores the PP of all moves for one Pokémon.

items.name: Max Repel
items.description: Prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 250 steps.

items.name: Medica
items.description: Medicine made of boiled herbs that restores 50 HP.

items.name: Medica II
items.description: Medicine made of flower extract that restores 80 HP.

items.name: Medica III
items.description: Medicine made of crushed nutshells that restores 120 HP.

items.name: Medica IV
items.description: Medicine made of pulverized coral that fully restores HP.

items.name: Medica V
items.description: Medicine made of Yggdrasil’s honey that fully restores HP and removes status.

items.name: Memento Vitae (Key Item)
items.description: An ancient artifact. Use it to make your Pokémon remember their moves.

items.name: Metal Coat
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A special metallic film that boosts the power of Steel-type moves.

items.name: Miracle Seed
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A seed imbued with life that boosts the power of Grass-type moves.

items.name: Moon Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Mystic Water
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A teardrop-shaped gem that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

items.name: Nectar
items.description: Revival elixir made of honey. Revives and restores 25% of the Pokémon’s max HP.

items.name: Nectar II
items.description: Revival elixir made of honey. Fully revives a Pokémon.

items.name: Nevermeltice
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A piece of ice that repels heat and boosts Ice-type moves.

items.name: Nugget
items.description: A nugget of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. It can be sold at a high price.

items.name: Offer. Bag (Key Item)
items.description: An offerings bag found in the First Stratum.

items.name: Old Amber (Key Item)
items.description: A piece of amber that contains the genes of an ancient Pokémon. It is clear with a reddish tint.

items.name: Old Rod
items.description: An old and beat-up fishing rod. Use it by any body of water to fish for wild Pokémon.

items.name: Oran Berry
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it will be used in battle to restore 10 HP.

items.name: Paralyz Heal
items.description: A spray-type medicine. It heals one Pokémon from paralysis.

items.name: Pearl
items.description: A relatively small pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold cheaply.

items.name: Pecha Berry
items.description: When held by a Pokémon, it will be used in battle to cure poison.

items.name: Perlite
items.description: A mineral that can be extracted from the Yggdrasil mines.

items.name: Poison Barb
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A small, poisonous barb that boosts the power of Poison-type moves.

items.name: Poké Ball
items.description: A Ball thrown to catch a wild Pokémon. It is designed in a capsule style.

items.name: Pokéflute (Key Item)
items.description: A flute that is said to instantly awaken any Pokémon. It has a lovely tone.

items.name: PP Up
items.description: Slightly raises the maximum PP of a selected move for one Pokémon.

items.name: PP-Max
items.description: Raises the PP of a selected move to its maximum level for one Pokémon.

items.name: Prism Scale
items.description: A mysterious scale that evolves certain Pokémon.

items.name: Protector
items.description: A durable piece of protective equipment. It allows certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.

items.name: Protein
items.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Attack stat of one Pokémon by 20.

items.name: Purple Flower
items.description: A purple flower that grows in the Yggdrasil Labyrinth.

items.name: Rawst Berry ↑↑
items.description: When held, it will be used in battle to heal a burn.

items.name: Reaper Cloth
items.description: A cloth imbued with spiritual energy. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.

items.name: Red Bell (Key Item)
items.description: A mysterious Red Bell found in the Third Stratum. It emanates a strange aura.

items.name: Red Flower
items.description: A red flower that grows in the Yggdrasil Labyrinth.

items.name: Red Shard
items.description: A small red shard. It appears to be from some sort of a tool made long ago.

items.name: Relic Gold
items.description: A gold coin used by an ancient civilization about 3.000 years ago.

items.name: Relic Silver
items.description: A silver coin used by an ancient civilization about 3.000 years ago.

items.name: Repel
items.description: Prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 100 steps.

items.name: Rocky Helmet
items.description: If held, the attacker will be damaged upon contact.

items.name: Sapphire
items.description: An exquisitely beautiful gem that has a blue glow. It symbolizes honesty.

items.name: Scope Lens
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A lens that boosts the critical-hit ratio of the holding Pokémon.

items.name: Sharp Beak
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A long, sharp beak that boosts the power of Flying-type moves.

items.name: Shell Bell
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holding Pokémon regains some HP upon striking the foe.

items.name: Shiny Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Silk Scarf
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of Normal-type moves.

items.name: Silverpowder
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A shiny silver powder that boosts the power of Bug-type moves.

items.name: Sitrus Berry
items.description: When held, it will be used in battle to restore 25% of max HP.

items.name: Soft Sand
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A loose, silky sand that boosts the power of Ground-type moves.

items.name: Spell Tag
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A sinister, eerie tag that boosts Ghost-type moves.

items.name: Star Pendant
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A sacred pendant that boosts the power of Aether-type moves.

items.name: Star Piece
items.description: A shard of a pretty gem that sparkles in a red color. It can be sold at a high price.

items.name: Stardust
items.description: A pretty red sand with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price.

items.name: Sun Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Super Repel
items.description: Prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 200 steps.

items.name: Super Rod
items.description: An awesome, high-tech fishing rod. Use it by any body of water to fish for wild Pokémon.

items.name: Tent
items.description: A camping tent. Use it to heal your team and recover your Stamina.

items.name: Theriaca
items.description: Panacea made of boiled flower petals. Removes status conditions.

items.name: Thunderstone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: Timer Ball
items.description: A somewhat different Ball that becomes progressively better the more turns there are in a battle.

items.name: TM01 (Drain Punch)
items.description: The user attacks with a draining punch, restoring its HP.

items.name: TM02 (Dragon Claw)
items.description: Sharp, huge claws hook and slash the foe quickly and with great power.

items.name: TM03 (Water Pulse)
items.description: An attack with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the foe.

items.name: TM04 (Calm Mind)
items.description: The user focuses its mind to raise the Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

items.name: TM05 Snarl

sources.location: Quest Reward: "Show me a Sneasel!", Krabby Club

items.description: The user yells, making the target’s Sp. Atk stat decrease.

items.name: TM06 (Toxic)
items.description: A move that badly poisons the foe. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

items.name: TM07 (Hail)
items.description: A hailstorm lasting five turns damages all Pokémon except the Ice-type.

items.name: TM08 (Bulk Up)
items.description: The user bulks up its body to boost both its Attack and Defense stats.

items.name: TM09 (Bullet Seed)
items.description: The user shoots seeds at the foe. Two to five seeds are shot at once.

items.name: TM10 (Flash Cannon)
items.description: Light energy is released at once. May also lower the target Sp. Def.

items.name: TM11 (Sunny Day)
items.description: The sun blazes for five turns, powering up Fire-type moves.

items.name: TM12 Taunt

sources.location: Talrega's Guild, TM machine near Rikkah

items.description: The foe is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves.

items.name: TM13 Ice Beam
items.description: The foe is struck with an icy beam. It may inflict frostbite.

items.name: TM14 (Blizzard)
items.description: The foe is struck with an icy beam. It may inflict frostbite.

items.name: TM15 (Hyper Beam)
items.description: A severely damaging attack that makes the user rest on the next turn.

items.name: TM16 Light Screen

sources.location: Quest Reward: "The Cake is a Lie", Krabby Club

items.description: A wall of light cuts damage from Sp. Atk attacks for five turns.

items.name: TM17 (Protect)
items.description: Enables the user to evade all attacks. It may fail if used in succession.

items.name: TM18 Rain Dance
items.description: A heavy rain falls for five turns, powering up Water- type moves.

items.name: TM19 (Giga Drain)
items.description: A harsh attack that absorbs half the damage it inflicted to restore HP.

items.name: TM20 Safeguard

sources.location: Talrega's Guild, TM machine near Rikkah

items.description: It protects the user’s party from all status problems for five turns.

items.name: TM21 (Return)
items.description: This attack move grows more powerful the less the user likes its Trainer.

items.name: TM21 Frustration
items.description: This attack move grows more powerful the less the user likes its Trainer.

items.name: TM22 (Solar Beam)
items.description: A 2-turn move that blasts the foe with absorbed energy in the 2nd turn.

items.name: TM23 (Iron Tail)
items.description: An attack with a steel-hard tail. It may lower the foe’s Defense stat.

items.name: TM24 (Thunderbolt)

sources.location: Quest Reward: "The lost Castform", Auburn Thicket

items.description: A strong electrical attack that may also leave the foe paralyzed.

items.name: TM25 (Thunder)

sources.location: Quest Reward: "The Mantis' Nest", Rade of Carcino

items.description: A brutal lightning attack that may also leave the foe paralyzed.

items.name: TM26 (Earthquake)
items.description: An earthquake that strikes all Pokémon in battle excluding the user.

items.name: TM27 (Frustration)
items.description: This attack move grows more powerful the more the user likes its Trainer.

items.name: TM27 Return
items.description: This attack move grows more powerful the more the user likes its Trainer.

items.name: TM28 (Dig)
items.description: An attack that hits on the 2nd turn.

items.name: TM29 (Psychic)
items.description: A strong telekinetic attack. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: TM30 (Shadow Ball)
items.description: A shadowy blob is hurled at the foe. May also lower the foe’s Sp. Def.

items.name: TM31 (Brick Break)

sources.location: Quest Reward: "One drink too many...", Brigit Farm

items.description: An attack that also breaks any barrier like Light Screen and Reflect.

items.name: TM32 (Double Team)
items.description: The user creates illusory copies of itself to raise its evasiveness.

items.name: TM33 Reflect

sources.location: Quest Reward: "The Cake is a Lie", Krabby Club

items.description: A wall of light cuts damage from physical attacks for five turns.

items.name: TM34 (Shock Wave)

sources.location: Quest Reward: "One drink too many...", Brigit Farm

items.description: A rapid jolt of electricity strikes the foe. It can’t be evaded.

items.name: TM35 (Flamethrower)
items.description: The foe is scorched with intense flames. The foe may suffer a burn.

items.name: TM36 (Sludge Bomb)
items.description: Filthy sludge is hurled at the foe. It may poison the target.

items.name: TM37 (Sandstorm)
items.description: A 5-turn sandstorm that damages all types except Rock, Ground, and Steel.

items.name: TM38 (Fire Blast)
items.description: The foe is hit with an intense flame. It may leave the target with a burn.

items.name: TM39 (Rock Tomb)
items.description: Boulders are hurled at the foe. It also lowers the foe’s Speed if it hits.

items.name: TM40 (Aerial Ace)
items.description: An extremely fast attack against one target. It can’t be evaded.

items.name: TM41 Torment

sources.location: Talrega's Guild, TM machine near Rikkah

items.description: It enrages the foe, making it incapable of using the same move successively.

items.name: TM42 (Facade)
items.description: An attack that is boosted if user is burned, poisoned, or paralyzed.

items.name: TM43 (Dragon Pulse)
items.description: The foe is attacked with a shock wave.

items.name: TM44 (Rest)
items.description: The user sleeps for two turns to fully restore HP and heal any status problem.

items.name: TM45 Attract

sources.location: Talrega's Guild, TM machine near Rikkah

items.description: If it is the other gender, the foe is made infatuated and unlikely to attack.

items.name: TM46 (Dark Pulse)
items.description: The user releases a horrible aura. May also make the target flinch.

items.name: TM47 Steel Wing
items.description: The foe is hit with wings of steel. It may also raise the user’s Defense.

items.name: TM48 (Skill Swap)
items.description: The user employs its psychic power to swap abilities with the foe.

items.name: TM49 (Scald)
items.description: Boiling hot water is shot at the enemy. May burn the target.

items.name: TM50 (Overheat)
items.description: An intense attack that also sharply reduces the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

items.name: Topaz
items.description: A mineral that can be extracted from the Yggdrasil mines.

items.name: Toxic Orb
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Poisons the holder at the end of the turn.

items.name: Twistedspoon
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A spoon imbued with telekinetic power boosts Psychic-type moves.

items.name: Ultra Ball
items.description: A very high-grade Ball that offers a higher Pokémon catch rate than a Great Ball.

items.name: Upgrade
items.description: A transparent device filled with all sorts of data. It is made by Silph Co.

items.name: Water Stone
items.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve.

items.name: White Herb
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It restores any lowered stat in battle. It can be used only once.

items.name: Wide Lens
items.description: Magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves.

items.name: Winged Boots
items.description: A pair of winged boots. If held, it boosts the user’s Speed stat by 15%.

items.name: Yellow Bell
items.description: A mysterious Yellow Bell found in the Fifth Stratum. It emanates a strange aura.

items.name: Yellow Flower
items.description: A yellow flower that grows in the Yggdrasil Labyrinth.

items.name: Yellow Shard
items.description: A small yellow shard. It appears to be from some sort of a tool made long ago.

items.name: Zinc
items.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Sp. Def stat of one Pokémon by 20.
